key_insight: This work revisits the recently proposed data-adaptive viscoelasticity (DAVIS) framework, a spline-based formulation of finite viscoelasticity within the generalized standard materials setting.
engineering_relevance: Potential relevance: constitutive modeling workflows and research evaluation.
